email_text:
Dear Team,
I need to book a 30-minute consultation call on February 10th, 2026.
My availability is between 2:00 PM and 5:00 PM PST.

Please confirm a time.

Regards,
Maria Garcia

Hello,
Could we arrange a 2-hour strategy workshop sometime between February 11th and February 13th, 2026?
I'm free from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM.

Thanks,
David Chen

Hi there,
I'd like to schedule a one-hour design review on February 9th or 10th, 2026.
Preferably between 10:00 AM and 12:30 PM PST.

Cheers,
Sophia Patel

Good afternoon,
Please set up a 45-minute budget planning session on February 12th, 2026.
I can meet between 3:00 PM and 6:00 PM.

Best,
James Okafor
